title: Change tab order in conversation panel
excerpt:
Is it possible to change the tab order in the Conversation panel so that the Updates tab appears by default? 
Thanks!

posts.author: Radnad (Rad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to change the tab order in the Conversation panel so that the Updates tab appears by default?

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Radnad!

Can you try changing the settings of the updates tab? It might be that another view has already been set as the default view.

Let me know how you go

posts.author: Radnad (Rad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for this @BiancaT
That would definitely work I believe, but even though I’m admin the option is greyed out.

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you reorder the tabs though. I have similar issue where I want to rearrange the tabs in certain order (Not just in conversation panel but also on the board level). Can you do that?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hm, can you let me know if there is a little house symbol next to any of the views in your conversation panel?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I am afraid not at this time! The workaround to this is utilising the set as board default option

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: I do have the home icon. You can’t save the changes from filters into home view (or main tab) and creating new views each time isn’t really ideal situation.

posts.author: Radnad (Rad)
posts.cookedHtml:
BiancaT:

Hm, can you let me know if there is a little house symbol next to any of the views in your conversation panel?

Indeed there is

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Are you the board owner? I ask this as only board owners will be able to change the default item view, even if you’re the account admin!

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BiancaT . Yes I’m the board owner. But just changing default view item doesn’t solve the issue. There should be a way to reorder the tabs.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Understood The more visibility on this request the better! Every quarter we take the features with the top votes to our development team for a response. Share this with your fellow community members to get the votes up

posts.author: Radnad (Rad)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also the board owner and the option is still greyed out.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hm this is a little strange! Are you able to send me a private message via community so I can take a closer look? Would you be able to include a screenshot of the board subscribers just to verify you’re a board owner?

posts.author: Radnad (Rad)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT Let’s do this… but I can’t find a way to send you a private message How do I do that?

posts.author: erozencwaig (Eric Rozencwaig)
posts.cookedHtml: this is a basic feature that MUST be added.

posts.author: Hunter (Hunter Wallace)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca?

Is this on the roadmap as a feature?
I have a default view, but not being able to choose which view shows second/third/etc would be valuable, and seems odd that it is still not an option several years later.
Thanks!
